seoTitle: Tesbury vs Thalia — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tesbury and Thalia. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tesbury and Thalia.
heading: Tesbury vs Thalia — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tesbury, Victoria and Thalia, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Thalia has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Tesbury (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tesbury or Thalia safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tesbury has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Thalia scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tesbury scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Thalia scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tesbury or Thalia?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Thalia has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
